view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario's requirements.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario's requirements.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario's requirements.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of rate limiting on public pages, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of the necessary components to perform this validation. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not provide concrete details about the rate limiting mechanism or its expected behavior in the context of the scenario. Therefore, the validation is blocked as the evidence does not support a definitive conclusion.
